hero.title: Experience Authentic Khmer Cuisine
hero.subtitle: Traditional Cambodian flavors served in a modern dining experience.

signatureDishes.name: One More Special Kuyteav
signatureDishes.desc: Rich bone broth with rice noodles, sliced meats, meatballs, fresh herbs and crisp bean sprouts.

signatureDishes.name: Minced Pork Kuyteav
signatureDishes.desc: Flavorful rice noodles in pork broth topped with perfectly seasoned minced pork and fresh chives.

signatureDishes.name: Hainan Chicken Thigh Rice
signatureDishes.desc: Fragrant seasoned rice served with crispy golden-fried chicken thigh and homemade dipping sauce.

signatureDishes.name: Pork Blood Porridge
signatureDishes.desc: Hearty and comforting rice porridge simmered with pork blood, offal, ginger and green scallions.

signatureDishes.name: Lort Cha with Beef & Egg
signatureDishes.desc: Stir-fried pin-noodles with tender beef, chives and bean sprouts, topped with a fried egg.

signatureDishes.name: Fish Amok in Coconut
signatureDishes.desc: Tender river fish fillets steamed in a rich, kaffir lime infused lemongrass curry mousse inside a fresh young coconut.

signatureDishes.name: Sour Seafood Soup
signatureDishes.desc: Traditional hot and sour seafood soup loaded with prawns, mushrooms and fragrant herbs.

signatureDishes.name: Pan-fried Fish Paste with Fresh Vegetables
signatureDishes.desc: Golden pan-fried fish paste served with a colorful selection of crisp fresh vegetables.

signatureDishes.name: Siem Reap Grilled Chicken
signatureDishes.desc: Whole local chicken marinated in traditional Cambodian herbs and slow-grilled to smoky perfection.

signatureDishes.name: Stir-fried Bok Choy
signatureDishes.desc: Crisp bok choy greens stir-fried in a roaring wok with garlic and savory oyster sauce.

signatureDishes.name: Fried Egg with Salted Fish
signatureDishes.desc: Traditional Cambodian dish of eggs fried with aromatic salted fish (Trey Pror-ma) and pork.

diningSpaces.name: Family Dining
diningSpaces.desc: Spacious tables for 4-10, high chairs available, playful sharing platters designed for togetherness.

diningSpaces.name: Private Room
diningSpaces.desc: An intimate enclosed dining room for 8вҖ“20, with dedicated staff, custom menus and AV capabilities.

diningSpaces.name: Business Meeting
diningSpaces.desc: Quiet, professional atmosphere with private tables, power outlets, screen connectivity and curated lunch sets.

diningSpaces.name: Kid Zone
diningSpaces.desc: A dedicated play corner with gentle Khmer-inspired activities, kid-friendly menu and attentive family hosts.

diningSpaces.name: Event & Gala
diningSpaces.desc: Expansive layout options with custom decor, state-of-the-art sound systems, and dedicated banquet planners.
